name: spadm-root
description: Root package for managing backend and frontend concurrently

scripts.start: npx concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others -n "backend,frontend" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
